zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线偏空震荡整理
zh.content:
以太坊当前报1651.31美元，24小时跌幅0.57%，价格运行于日内低位附近。整体来看，市场仍处于短线弱势整理格局，价格低于20日均线1665.42美元，显示空头暂时占据主动，但跌幅有限，表明下方仍存在一定承接力量。

从技术指标观察，MACD值为-6.43，处于零轴下方，反映市场动能偏空，短期趋势尚未出现明显反转信号。由于RSI数据缺失，暂无法确认超买或超卖状态，但结合价格表现与均线位置判断，市场情绪仍偏谨慎，买盘力量相对不足。

关键支撑位可关注1650美元附近，该位置与日内低点1650.69接近，若有效跌破，可能进一步测试1640美元区域。上方首个阻力位位于1661美元至1665美元区间，其中20日均线构成重要压力，突破后有望挑战1680美元水平。

交易策略方面，短线投资者宜保持谨慎，等待价格重新站稳1665美元上方再考虑顺势做多。若价格持续受压于均线下方，可采取反弹减仓或轻仓高空思路。同时应严格设置止损，控制仓位风险，防范震荡行情中的快速波动。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 1,651.31, holding just above the session low of 1,650.69 after a modest 24-hour decline of 0.57%. Price action remains weak in the short term, with ETH trading below the 20-period simple moving average at 1,665.42. This positioning suggests bearish momentum continues to dominate, although the narrow daily range indicates sellers may be losing some conviction as the market approaches a potential support zone.

The moving average structure points to a short-term downtrend, and the negative MACD reading of -6.43 reinforces that bearish momentum remains in place. While the signal line and RSI values are unavailable, the current data suggests that buyers have not yet regained sufficient strength to reverse the recent decline. A sustained move back above the SMA(20) would be needed to improve sentiment and signal a possible shift toward neutral or bullish conditions.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the intraday low around 1,650, with a more significant support area developing near 1,640 if selling pressure intensifies. On the upside, resistance is evident around the SMA(20) at 1,665, followed by a stronger barrier near 1,680 where previous recoveries may encounter renewed selling interest. A breakout above these levels would strengthen the case for a broader recovery.

For traders, a cautious approach is warranted while ETH remains below its short-term average. Aggressive buyers may look for stabilization above 1,650 and confirmation of higher lows before entering long positions. Momentum traders could consider bullish opportunities only after a decisive move above 1,665–1,680. Conversely, failure to hold current support may favor short-term bearish strategies targeting lower support zones, with disciplined risk management essential given cryptocurrency market volatility.
